communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Colorado Open Records Act, I hereby request the following records:

Databases or information related to Child Care Stabilization, New Provider Success, and Workforce Sustainability Grants in Colorado. Specifically, information at the grant-to-provider level, including a list of providers who were awarded the grants, addresses, licensed capacity, amounts awarded, and any other variables that factor into the grant scoring criteria or the calculation that determines the awarded amount.

If available, information on the process of applying for the grants, information on the process of allocating the grants, information about rejected applications, and information on any other grants available to providers from the state.

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 3 business days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

Gabrielle Pepin
